arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the RDS certificate.

certificate_type.description: The type of the RDS certificate, indicating its purpose or use.

customer_override.description: Indicates whether the customer has overridden the default certificate.

customer_override_valid_till.description: The date until which the customer override is valid.

id.description: The unique identifier for the RDS certificate.

thumbprint.description: The thumbprint of the RDS certificate, used to verify its authenticity.

valid_from.description: The date from which the RDS certificate is valid.

valid_till.description: The date until which the RDS certificate remains valid.
